children.text: You’re just a minute away from voice chatting with your friends.
By using the app, you agree to our Terms of Service Agreement and Privacy Policy.
Sign in with social networks to find friends. We won’t invite anyone without asking your permission first.
You can enter a phone number and/or email address to make it easier for friends to find you.
Your Privacy Level controls who can contact you without an invitation.

Congratulations! You’re ready to voice chat with HeyTell! 

• If you received an invitation via SMS or email, this would be a great time to tap the link! 

• Tap your MENU button from the next screen to access more options.
